channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Daffodil planting, 10th March
item.description:
As previously requested, Merton Gardens is a central green not a verge, so the daffodil planting request was for this area. There are beautiful displays of daffodils on similar greens in the surrounding areas, ie Frankswood Avenue, Southborough Lane, Fairway, Oxhawth Crescent etc. So why not Merton Gardens?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merton Gardens, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2023 this was 1st reported, 10th March
item.description:
The tree is no longer secure in the ground and either needs re-planting or strengthening barriers added please Urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked to cause maximum impact on disabled resident, 10th March
item.description:
The number is on the attached photo. This Lime bike was parked to cause maximum obstruction for a disabled resident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Sandringham Road, Shacklewell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Primrose Hill Primary school, 10th March
item.description:
The cover for the manhole cover is broken and sunken, this caused my 3 year old daughter to trip into the hole and also twisted her ankle. This needs to be repaired to prevent further harm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Princess Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest Bike left on pavement on Robert Street, 10th March
item.description:
1 Abandoned Forest Bike left on pavement on Robert Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Robert Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest Bike left on pavement on Robert Street., 10th March
item.description:
1 Abandoned Forest Bike left on pavement on Robert Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strand, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large road damage, 10th March
item.description:
Not safe especially fir cycling --- is there for more than two month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willifield Way, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Night blind spot danger from defunct street light, 10th March
item.description:
The street light on West Heath Road north side, opposite Branch Hill is apparently awaiting repair/replacement as it is visibly damaged, missing its lamp and taped around. As a result, traffic proceeding east around this corner is plunged suddenly into darkness at night, an especial hazard for cyclists. Therefore I hope this is being treated with urgency.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned building waste, 10th March
item.description:
This has been reported 2 times. It has been there over 6 months It gets marked as fixed yet is still there The last time it was reported to be dealt with in the next weekly cleanse. This was 2 weeks ago.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Piedmont Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several rubbish bins left outside our garage entrance/exit, 10th March
item.description:
Problem is located in the courtyard behind Old Dover Rd, SE3 7BT. The garage gate obstructed is the back entrance to 61 St John’s Park, SE3 7JW. The bins appear to contain leaves & tree refuse. They have been there for some years, presumably left by a contractor working for the Council. We cannot open our gate until these bins are removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Dover Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and very manhole cover for more than 2 weeks......, 9th March
item.description:
Loose and very noisy manhole cover in the middle of the road just before mini roundabout leading up to Chislehurst Road. This is not only a safety concern but also it makes alot of noise as cars travel over it. Please rectify. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag conta, 9th March
item.description:
Black bag containing builders materials dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pile of rubbish bags left out on the street, 9th March
item.description:
This pile of rubbish bags has been left on the street for several days. They are obstructing the pavement and causing an unhygienic environment.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose, badly fitting manhole cover possibly dangerous., 9th March
item.description:
Loose, badly fitting manhole cover possibly dangerous

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Road, Mottingham, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 street lights not working, 9th March
item.description:
4 street lights (all in a row) not working

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Road, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire road surface come away, 9th March
item.description:
2 months of the entire road surface crumblin, debris and metres and metres of potholes some 8 or so inches deep, rubble and exposed cobbles, cars struggle over it. I’ve seen tyre blow outs on cars and they are enough to fatally injure cyclists. The road needs to be closed. It’s a huge section. Seemingly previous tarmac repairs done cheaply and come away with the rain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 339, Liverpool Road, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Strret light not working, 9th March
item.description:
Street light not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 broken paving slabs, 9th March
item.description:
Can these be marked up and replaced please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Dumped furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilda Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Wheely bin, 9th March
item.description:
A seemingly abandoned black bin with no lid has been left on the corner of ceres road (a fly tipping hot spot) for weeks and is filled with rubbish but doesn't get emptied since it's not outside a house. It's attracting flies and vermin and smells rancid.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
